message:
a11y(components): Add ARIA labels to remaining canvas visualizations

Extends accessibility improvements to additional components:

Overlays:
- EpistasisOverlay: Gene interaction network
- NicheNetworkOverlay: Ecological niche visualization
- PhylodynamicsOverlay: Phylogenetic tree and timeline
- PromoterOverlay: Promoter region heatmap
- ResistanceEvolutionOverlay: Resistance evolution timeline

Simulations:
- EvolutionVisualizer: Population evolution graph
- LysogenyVisualizer: Lysogeny cycle animation
- PackagingMotorVisualizer: DNA packaging motor simulation
- PlaqueVisualizer: Plaque formation animation
- ResistanceVisualizer: Antibiotic resistance simulation
- RibosomeVisualizer: Ribosome translation simulation

Also adds ARIA label to DotPlotView for sequence self-similarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
